summary: End-to-end testing of Brain Dump AI Parser (Session 3) — all backend pytest tests (6/6) and all 14 frontend flow steps PASS. Backend: Claude integration via emergentintegrations works (~6-10s per call), validation, rate-limit (10/hour) with Retry-After header all correct. Frontend: KI Brain Dump collapsible section integrates correctly with ShoppingTab, parse/preview/edit/save flow works, textarea auto-clears and section auto-collapses after save, sticky header retained, items persist to Supabase grocery_items table.
passing_backend_tests: POST /api/brain-dump/parse — empty text -> 400 'Text darf nicht leer sein.'
POST /api/brain-dump/parse — whitespace-only -> 400 'Text darf nicht leer sein.'
POST /api/brain-dump/parse — normal German brain dump (6 items) returns 6 well-formed items with valid name/quantity/unit/category/note; all categories ∈ allowed list; all units ∈ allowed list
Rate limit — 10 successful calls then 11th returns 429 with Retry-After header > 0
passing_frontend_tests: Login as Tim -> Shopping tab -> brain-dump-section visible below add-input
brain-dump-toggle expands section, shows textarea + charcount '0/500' + KI-Parse button
KI-Parse with '3 Bananen, 1L Milch, 2 Brot' -> loading -> preview with 3 rows (Banane, Milch, Brot)
Each preview row has editable name/qty/unit/category + remove button
Deselecting checkbox updates save button label '3 hinzufügen' -> '2 hinzufügen'
brain-dump-discard returns to textarea view (text preserved)
brain-dump-save triggers 3 POST calls to Supabase grocery_items, items appear in correct categories (Banane in Obst & Gemüse, Milch in Milch & Alternativen, Brot in Bäckerei & Brot)
After save: textarea cleared AND section auto-collapsed
Unchecked count badge shows '3' after save (matches 3 added items)
Sticky header (Einkaufsliste + add input + KI Brain Dump) remains visible after scrolling
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: server.py defines `logger` at line 298 (bottom of file), but it is referenced inside `brain_dump_parse` (lines 241, 244, 251, 260, 270). It works because Python resolves names at call time, but logger should be initialized before route definitions for correctness/readability.
Minor: BrainDump.jsx slices textarea to MAX_CHARS+20 (line 170) — allows brief overflow into amber/red warning zone, intentional UX. Backend correctly enforces hard 500-char limit.
test_credentials: Tim: tmp.wanger@gmail.com / Fini63720 (used for FE login)
seed_data_creation: Created 3 grocery items via Brain Dump save flow (Banane/Milch/Brot under Tim's account in Supabase grocery_items). NOTE: Supabase grocery_items table now exists (Session 2 blocker resolved).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 3 Brain Dump AI Parser fully working end-to-end. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_brain_dump.py reusable for regression. The Supabase grocery_items table from previous iteration's blocker is now created and accepting writes. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY in /app/backend/.env works with claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929. Rate-limit test consumes 10 LLM calls per fresh user_id, so always use uuid suffix.
